articles.title: SEC Approves First BTC-ETH Index ETFs
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has taken a major step in bridging the gap between digital assets and traditional finance by approving cryptocurrency ETFs from Franklin Templeton and Hashdex. The post SEC Approves New Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: The Daily: US Bitcoin ETFs witness record outflows, SEC approves first spot Bitcoin and Ethereum combo funds and more
articles.description: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.

articles.title: Ether ETFs poised to surge in 2025, analysts say
articles.description: Strong price performance and staking could propel Ether ETF inflows in 2025, analysts say.

articles.title: Crypto Investor Makes Over 3,600,000% Profit Trading Memecoins
articles.description: An investor has made an incredible profit by diving into a new meme coin, built on the Solana blockchain. The post Crypto Investor Makes Over 3,600,000% Profit Trading Memecoins appeared first on Cryptodnes.

articles.title: Algorand’s ‘80% hike’ – Can traders profit from ALGO and buy the dip now?
articles.description: Spike in active addresses could be as a result of traders selling ALGO to minimize their losses during the dip.

articles.title: German Regulators Order Worldcoin to Delete User Data
articles.description: German regulators have ordered Worldcoin to delete biometric user data over GDPR violations, sparking a legal battle with the company.

articles.title: SEC Approves First Hybrid Bitcoin-Ethereum ETFs From Hashdex, Franklin Templeton
articles.description: Following multiple review extensions since June, the regulator has approved the first dual Bitcoin-Ethereum ETFs.
